dialogs.script:
showimage: pokemon/Front/bulbasaur
say: Bulbasaur!
say: The Seed Pokemon. A Grass and Poison type.
say: A great choice for a beginner!
choice: Do you want to choose Bulbasaur?
setflag: starter_pending_bulbasaur
clearflag: starter_pending_charmander
clearflag: starter_pending_squirtle
say: Great choice! You have chosen Bulbasaur!
say: Talk to Prof. Oak to confirm!
setflag: starter_is_bulbasaur
clearflag: starter_is_charmander
clearflag: starter_is_squirtle
hidenpc
lines: The Seed Pokemon. A Grass and Poison type.
A great choice for a beginner!
Great choice! You have chosen Bulbasaur!
Talk to Prof. Oak to confirm!
